verdict_dm: FAIL — SQT cross-section ABOVE limits, conflict with detection nulls
verdict: SQT n field at eV mass (1.52e-34 eV), naive sigma_np ~ 1.20e-24 cm^2. vs SENSEI eV-scale limit ~1e-30 cm^2. FAIL — SQT cross-section ABOVE limits, conflict with detection nulls. However, derivation of n-nucleon coupling not yet explicit — caveat applies.
